query:
Extract the following attributes from text and output TOML.

Return ONLY TOML.

ATTRIBUTES:
user.profile.name, user.profile.contact.email, user.profile.contact.phone

TEXT:
user.profile.name: Aya Tanaka | user.profile.contact.email: aya@example.com | user.profile.contact.phone: +81-90-1234-5678

Convert the given order list into TOML.
Rules:
- Use [[orders.items]] for the items list.
- Return ONLY TOML.

DATA:
order_id=ORD-1001; currency=JPY; items=[(sku=AA-1, qty=2),(sku=BB-9, qty=1)]
output:
[orders]
order_id = "ORD-1001"
currency = "JPY"

[[orders.items]]
sku = "AA-1"
qty = 2

[[orders.items]]
sku = "BB-9"
qty = 1

query:
Output TOML representing the config described below.
Return ONLY TOML.

SPEC:
- db.host = "localhost"
- db.port = 5432
- db.pool.size = 20
- db.pool.timeout_sec = 5

Extract to TOML. Use dotted tables for nested objects. Return ONLY TOML.

ATTRIBUTES:
app.features.auth.enabled, app.features.auth.providers[0], app.features.auth.providers[1], app.logging.level

TEXT:
app.features.auth.enabled: true | app.features.auth.providers[0]: google | app.features.auth.providers[1]: github | app.logging.level: info

Transform this inventory summary into TOML.
Rules: use [[warehouse.sections.bins]] for bins. Return ONLY TOML.

DATA:
warehouse_id=W-7; section=A; bins=[(bin=1, sku=X1, count=3),(bin=2, sku=Y9, count=8)]
output:
[warehouse]
warehouse_id = "W-7"

[warehouse.sections]
name = "A"

[[warehouse.sections.bins]]
bin = 1
sku = "X1"
count = 3

[[warehouse.sections.bins]]
bin = 2
sku = "Y9"
count = 8

TEXT:
